auth.label: API Key
auth.description: SuperSaaS account API key sent with the account name on API requests. Generate it at the bottom of Account Info after signing in: https://www.supersaas.com/accounts/edit#api_key.

extraFields.label: Account Name
extraFields.description: The SuperSaaS account name sent with API requests. It is the account identifier used in your SuperSaaS dashboard and API examples.

actions.name: list_appointments
actions.description: List appointments or slots for one SuperSaaS schedule in a time range.

from.description: A SuperSaaS date or timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format.

to.description: A SuperSaaS date or timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format.

today.description: Whether SuperSaaS should use the current local day as the range.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

offset.description: The result offset used for pagination.

user.description: A SuperSaaS user name, user ID, or foreign key used to filter bookings.

slot.description: Whether to include capacity schedule slot information.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SuperSaaS bookings.

items.description: A raw SuperSaaS booking, change, or slot object. Custom account fields are preserved.

bookings.description: SuperSaaS bookings in the requested range.

items.description: A raw SuperSaaS booking, change, or slot object. Custom account fields are preserved.

slots.description: SuperSaaS slots in the requested range.

actions.name: list_field_names
actions.description: List available SuperSaaS fields for a schedule or for the user object.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SuperSaaS field names.

fields.description: The raw SuperSaaS field list response.

outputSchema.description: The field list returned by SuperSaaS.

actions.name: list_groups
actions.description: List groups in the connected SuperSaaS account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

items.description: One tuple value returned by SuperSaaS.
A SuperSaaS tuple such as [id, name].

actions.name: list_recent_changes
actions.description: List recently changed bookings for one SuperSaaS schedule.

from.description: A SuperSaaS date or timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format.

to.description: A SuperSaaS date or timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format.

today.description: Whether SuperSaaS should use the current local day as the range.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

offset.description: The result offset used for pagination.

user.description: A SuperSaaS user name, user ID, or foreign key used to filter bookings.

slot.description: Whether to include capacity schedule slot information.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SuperSaaS bookings.

items.description: A raw SuperSaaS booking, change, or slot object. Custom account fields are preserved.

bookings.description: SuperSaaS bookings in the requested range.

items.description: A raw SuperSaaS booking, change, or slot object. Custom account fields are preserved.

slots.description: SuperSaaS slots in the requested range.

actions.name: list_resources
actions.description: List resources or services for one SuperSaaS schedule.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for one SuperSaaS schedule.

items.description: One tuple value returned by SuperSaaS.
A SuperSaaS tuple such as [id, name].

outputSchema.description: The resources or services returned by SuperSaaS.

actions.name: list_schedules
actions.description: List schedules in the connected SuperSaaS account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

items.description: One tuple value returned by SuperSaaS.
A SuperSaaS tuple such as [id, name].

actions.name: list_super_forms
actions.description: List SuperForms in the connected SuperSaaS account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

items.description: One tuple value returned by SuperSaaS.
A SuperSaaS tuple such as [id, name].
